title: Bumpy Configuration
description: Configuration for @varlock/bumpy — monorepo versioning and changelog tool

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON schema

commit.description: Auto-commit changes after `bumpy version`. false = don't commit, true = commit with default message, or an object for custom message.

generateFn.description: Path to a module that exports a function to generate the commit message. The function receives the release plan as its argument.

changelog.description: Changelog formatter — "default", "github", or path to a custom formatter. Can also be a tuple of [formatter, options]. Set to false to disable changelog generation.

changedFilePatterns.description: Glob patterns to filter which changed files count toward marking a package as changed. Can be overridden per-package.

fixed.description: Package groups that always bump together to the same version. Each element is an array of package name globs.

linked.description: Package groups that share the highest bump level. Each element is an array of package name globs.

ignore.description: Package name globs to exclude from versioning

include.description: Package name globs to explicitly include (overrides ignore and privatePackages)

updateInternalDependencies.description: When to update internal dependency version ranges

dependencyBumpRules.description: Controls how bumps propagate through dependency types

privatePackages.description: Whether to version and/or create git tags for private packages

tag.description: Whether to create git tags for private packages

allowCustomCommands.description: Allow per-package custom commands (buildCommand, publishCommand, checkPublished) defined in package.json "bumpy" fields. true = allow all, string[] = allow matching package name globs, false = only root-config commands allowed.

packages.description: Per-package config overrides, keyed by package name or glob pattern

packManager.description: Package manager to use for packing. "auto" detects from lockfile.

publishManager.description: Command to use for publishing. npm supports OIDC/provenance.

publishArgs.description: Extra args appended to the publish command (e.g., "--provenance")

protocolResolution.description: How to handle workspace:/catalog: protocol resolution. "pack" = use PM's pack to build a clean tarball, "in-place" = rewrite package.json before publish, "none" = don't resolve.

aggregateRelease.description: GitHub release creation (requires gh CLI). false = individual release per package, true = single aggregated release, or an object with enabled and optional title (supports {{date}}).

enabled.description: Whether to create an aggregated release

title.description: Custom title for the aggregated release (supports {{date}})

gitUser.description: Git identity used for CI commits

versionPr.description: Customize the version PR created by bumpy ci release

branch.description: Branch name for the version PR

preamble.description: HTML/markdown content prepended to the PR body

trigger.description: Minimum bump level that triggers propagation

bumpAs.description: What level to bump the dependent ("match" mirrors the triggering level)

oneOf.description: Set to false to disable propagation for this dependency type

managed.description: Explicitly opt this package in or out of version management

publishCommand.description: Custom command(s) to publish this package (replaces npm publish)

skipNpmPublish.description: Don't publish to npm (still creates git tags)

checkPublished.description: Custom command that outputs the currently published version

changedFilePatterns.description: Glob patterns to filter which changed files count toward marking this package as changed (overrides root setting)

dependencyBumpRules.description: Per-package override for dependency propagation rules

cascadeTo.description: Explicit cascade targets — glob pattern mapped to { trigger, bumpAs }

trigger.description: Minimum bump level that triggers the cascade

bumpAs.description: What level to bump the target
